name: शैव
description: Tradition centered on Lord Shiva as the Supreme Being.

name: वैष्णव
description: Tradition centered on Lord Vishnu and his avatars as the Supreme Being.

name: शाक्त
description: Tradition centered on Devi (the Goddess) as the Supreme Power.

name: स्मार्त
description: Liberal tradition following the Smriti texts, worshipping five deities equally.

name: सौर
description: Tradition centered on Surya (the Sun God) as the Supreme Being.

name: गाणपत्य
description: Tradition centered on Ganesha as the Supreme Being.

name: सर्वसाधारण
description: Texts that are revered across all traditions and panths.

name: वारकरी
description: Devotional tradition of Maharashtra centered on worship of Vitthal (Vishnu) at Pandharpur, founded by saints like Dnyaneshwar and Tukaram.

name: दत्त संप्रदाय
description: Tradition centered on Lord Dattatreya (the combined form of Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva) and his incarnations like Shripad Shri Vallabh and Shri Nrusimha Saraswati.
